name: Nanaimo Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 tb Vanilla custard powder (e.g., vanilla bean paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the first layer, melt butter, sugar, and cocoa powder in a double boiler over barely simmering water. Stir occasionally until melted. Add beaten egg and cook to thicken. Remove from heat and stir in graham wafer crumbs, coconut, and almonds. Press firmly into an ungreased 8-inch square pan. Chill.
2. For the second layer, cream butter, cream, and custard powder together in a bowl. Gradually beat in icing sugar until light and fluffy. Spread over the first layer. Chill.
3. For the icing, melt chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler over barely simmering water (or in a microwave). Stir to combine. Cool to room temperature. Spread evenly over the second layer with a spatula. Chill.
4. Cut into bars. Makes 16-24.
